label: The Quiet Bunkroom
description: The Quiet Bunkroom is a narrow sleeping bay partitioned off the Riftward Canteen’s basalt vaults with riveted wreck-metal panels and a sealable bulkhead. Tiered bunks are bolted directly into the vitrified stone, their frames braced against the bastion’s constant vibration and distant thunder of electrostatic storms. Mesh-baffled lumen strips cast the same bruise-hued light as the drinking hall, while vox-suppression sheeting and condenser vents keep ash grit and interference out of the air. Lockers of slag-stained steel line the inner wall, their surfaces etched by repeated cleaning solvents and abrasive dust.
